# Public mirror allowlist for ai-grc-platform (community/free repository).
# One glob/path per line. Lines beginning with # are comments.

# Top-level
README.md
LICENSE
QUICK_START.md
.gitignore

# GitHub workflows and mirror config
.github/workflows/ci.yml
.github/public-mirror-allowlist.txt

# Public docs
docs/openapi.yaml
docs/POSITIONING_GUARDRAILS.md
docs/SMALL_START_DEPLOYMENT_PROFILE.md
docs/CONTENT_PACKS.md
docs/MCP_SETUP.md
docs/PUBLIC_MIRROR_SETUP.md

# Backend runtime and migration assets
backend/package.json
backend/apply-migration.mjs
backend/run-migration.js
backend/migrations/**
backend/src/**

# Backend scripts safe for community usage
backend/scripts/check-syntax.js
backend/scripts/check-db.js
backend/scripts/migrate-all.js
backend/scripts/run-migration.js
backend/scripts/ip-hygiene-check.js
backend/scripts/seed-frameworks.js
backend/scripts/seed-missing-controls.js
backend/scripts/seed-assessment-procedures.js
backend/scripts/seed-assessment-procedures-expansion.js
backend/scripts/seed-assessment-procedures-summary.js
